message:
🌱 Add argo-events: Message distribution across partitions when using Kafka mission (#1123)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-events-3695-message-distribution-across-partitions-when-using-kafka-eventbu",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-events: Message distribution across partitions when using Kafka EventBus",
+    "description": "Message distribution across partitions when using Kafka EventBus. This issue affects 6+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify argo-events troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your argo-events deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events -n argo-events --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-events configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events\n```\nArgo Events is using the trigger name as the Kafka message key for all messages produced by a sensor\n\nSince all sensor replicas have the same trigger name, all messages end up with the same key\n\nIn Kafka, messages with the same key are routed to the"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Message distribution across partitions when using Kafka…",
+        "description": "This PR resolves https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events/issues/3695\n\n1. Adds an optional field `spec.kafka.partitioner` to the **EventBus** CRD to select the Kafka producer partitioning mode: `random`, `hash`, `roundrobin`, or `manual`. \n\n2. Changes default partitioner mode from `hash` to `random`\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Message distribution across partitions when using… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events -n argo-events --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR resolves https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events/issues/3695\n\n1. Adds an optional field `spec.kafka.partitioner` to the **EventBus** CRD to select the Kafka producer partitioning mode: `random`, `hash`, `roundrobin`, or `manual`. \n\n2. Changes default partitioner mode from `hash` to `random`",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-events",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "argo-events"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod"
+    ],

+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",

+      "issue": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events/issues/3695",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-events/pull/3696"
+    },
+    "reactions": 6,

+  },

+    ],

+  },
